notes: Solid snake implementation with audio, hi-score persistence, and proper collision detection; eyes on head don't rotate with direction and the score display overlaps the top row of the grid slightly, but overall a clean and functional build.
Excellent implementation with a perfect input queue and audio, though following your own tail incorrectly triggers a collision and the snake's eyes don't rotate with movement.

Core snake gameplay works with start/restart, scoring, food, collisions, and responsive controls, but there are notable polish/logic issues such as fixed head eyes direction, no pause/touch support, and potentially unfair self-collision when moving into the tail's departing cell.
